properties.entry: SELECT f.facility_id, f.facility_name, f.description, fi.image_path FROM hotel_facility f JOIN facility_image fi ON f.facility_id = fi.facility_id WHERE fi.is_main='Y' ORDER BY f.facility_id
SELECT * FROM facility_image WHERE facility_id=? ORDER BY display_order

SELECT f.facility_id, f.facility_name, f.description, f.location, f.open_time, fi.image_path FROM hotel_facility f LEFT JOIN facility_image fi ON f.facility_id = fi.facility_id AND fi.is_main = 'Y' ORDER BY f.facility_id
